history.text: Administrative union tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Papua New Guinea became independent, marking the start of modern sovereign statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Kokoda Track:
worthSeeing.text: Historic WWII trail through dense jungle and remote highland villages.

worthSeeing.title: Tufi Fjords:
worthSeeing.text: Dramatic drowned river valleys on the Cape Nelson peninsula.

worthSeeing.title: Sepik River:
worthSeeing.text: River journey through traditional villages, carved spirit houses, and sacred masks.
